creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Harald Schmalzbauer from comment #15)

I do partially understand source file integrity checks, so my first idea is to manifest yarn.lock from upstream for dynamically building DISTFILES - like fetch-yarn already does!
The port version/revision must be tied to yarn.lock (checksums) as far as I understand the distribution model, right?
